globalNews.title: Trump says US will hit Iran 'hard' again on Wednesday
globalNews.summary: The US president warns Iran "will have to pay the price" for taking too long to agree a deal, after Tehran vows retaliation to any attacks.

globalNews.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17, reports say
globalNews.summary: Nine of them were killed in a series of attacks in the town of Tayr Debba, according to Lebanon's state news agency.

globalNews.title: Norway crown princess's son to stay in custody before rape verdict, says court
globalNews.summary: Thr ruling overturns a lower court's decision on Monday ordering the release of the crown princess's 29-year-old son.

globalNews.title: World Cup referee denied US entry arrives home to hero's welcome in Somalia
globalNews.summary: Omar Artan vows to officiate at the 2030 tournament instead, following his ban from entering the US.

globalNews.title: Ukraine says missiles hit military plant deep inside Russia
globalNews.summary: Ukraine's military also says it has struck a Russian oil refinery and a "shadow fleet" oil tanker in the Black Sea.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin rises despite US inflation hitting 3-year high: Where will BTC price go?
cryptoNews.summary: BTC's rebound shows signs of weakening under a string of technical resistance levels, raising the odds of a dip below $60,000 in June.

cryptoNews.title: Onchain gambling keeps rolling with $14B quarter despite crypto slump: TRM Labs
cryptoNews.summary: TRM Labs said onchain gambling reached $51 billion in 2025, with repeat users and stablecoin flows helping the sector remain resilient during a broader crypto market pullback.

cryptoNews.title: AI deepfake election ad in Minnesota raises transparency concerns
cryptoNews.summary: A deepfake campaign attack ad in the US state of Minnesota has raised questions around the ethics of using AI in political ads and the regulations surround AI use.

cryptoNews.title: Tenev says Robinhood won underwriter approval as crypto markets front-run mega IPOs
cryptoNews.summary: Robinhood’s new IPO underwriter role comes as SpaceX prepares a record-breaking public offering, with retail brokers and crypto-native derivatives platforms racing to shape price discovery and access.

cryptoNews.title: Crypto outflows are sentiment shock, not structural crisis: CoinShares' Butterfill
cryptoNews.summary: CoinShares’ James Butterfill said recent crypto outflows reflect a macro-driven sentiment shock, while other analysts warned Bitcoin’s rebound may remain fragile.

aiNews.title: How memory tools can make AI models worse
aiNews.summary: New research suggests that AI memory systems can degrade model performance and encourage sycophantic tendencies.

aiNews.title: Cybersecurity researchers aren’t happy about the guardrails on Anthropic’s Fable
aiNews.summary: Cybersecurity researchers are complaining that Anthropic's new model Fable has guardrails that are too strict for any cybersecurity work.

aiNews.title: Datadog veterans launch AI coding startup Niteshift on a bet against Big AI lock-in
aiNews.summary: AI coding agent startup Niteshift has raised a $7 million seed round from a who's who of angels. It's betting companies will want power over, not lock-in with model makers.

aiNews.title: The three hard-tech moonshots fueling SpaceX’s unbelievable IPO
aiNews.summary: Most of the value in SpaceX's IPO is effectively a call option on the company's ambitious space data center plans.

aiNews.title: Warner Music acquires AI attribution startup Sureel AI
aiNews.summary: Through the acquisition, WMG aims to better track when its artists' work is used in AI-generated content or for training AI models.

economicCalendar.description: Consumer Price Index - key inflation measure
Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
